name: Un Stuffed Bell Pepper Soup (Vegan)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Red or green peppers; dice
2 1/2 cups Red or green peppers; chop
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 5-6 quart pot, bring water and rice to boil.
2. Add diced onions and cook until the rice is slightly tender, about 25 minutes.
3. Reduce heat and add diced bell peppers, celery, chopped bell pepper squares, carrots, minced garlic, oregano, celery seed, and tomato paste.
4. Continue simmering covered for about 20-30 minutes or until all vegetables are tender and rice is fully cooked.
5. Stir in chili powder, tamari soy sauce, and salt to taste. Simmer an additional 5 minutes.
6. Adjust seasonings as needed. For a creamier broth, add a few tablespoons of powdered vegetable broth if desired.
